description: A new customer with a compatible phone wants to activate their service using an eSIM instead of a physical SIM.

nodes.task_description: Verify the customer's phone model is eSIM compatible.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the device supports eSIM.

nodes.task_description: Generate an eSIM QR code and send it to the customer's email.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates and emails the QR code.

nodes.task_description: Guide the customer on how to scan the QR code in their phone's settings to complete activation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear instructions for eSIM activation.
